font_stack: Noto Serif SC + IBM Plex Sans + Noto Sans SC
palette: custom near-white / blue-ink / neutral graphite OKLCH
motion: one orchestrated reveal with reduced-motion fallback
finding: Kept the Split Studio structure and official MathArts copy; tightened Chinese typography and vertical rhythm, removed duplicate repository links, added active-section navigation and an ARIA command palette with focus restoration.
responsive: verified at 320 / 375 / 414 / 768 / 1280 CSS px with no horizontal overflow and no visible target below 44px
